question: What year is displayed on the Administration Building plaque?
What color is the adjustable desk lamp positioned on the wooden desk? A. Blue B. Red C. Green D. White
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A young man with short brown hair wears a white t-shirt with a black graphic print while sitting at a dark wooden desk. He writes in a spiral-bound notebook using a silver pen, with his left hand resting on a dark blue book while a red desk lamp with a conical shade stands behind the notebook, and later holds a blue rectangular box with a yellow stripe in his left hand.

question: How many cars are visible when the man in the black suit lowers his hands from the thumbs up position?

Which of the previously seen objects is visible on the desk in this segment? A. Collage of four images showing a campus scene B. Red desk lamp with a flexible, segmented neck and a conical shade C. Dark blue rectangular box with a yellow stripe D. Gold-colored credit card with a white magnetic stripe

Did the video display BOTH a sign reading 'STUDENT UNION' AND a red desk lamp? A. Only the sign was displayed B. Only the red desk lamp was displayed C. Both the sign and the red desk lamp were displayed D. Neither was displayed

Where is the spiral-bound notebook placed during the indoor study scene? A. on a stone pillar B. on the desk C. on a rock base D. on the screen
What action is the person wearing a white t-shirt performing?
Describe the sequence of scenes and actions shown in the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a montage of university signs and brick buildings appears; at 6s, the text All About Credit overlays campus scenes; at 10s, a young man begins writing in a notebook at a desk; at 16s, he reaches for the red lamp base; at 18s, he holds a blue box while pointing at the notebook.

A man in a black suit raises both hands to give a thumbs up gesture. D. A person drinks from a white cup using a green straw.

How has the primary object the person interacts with changed from the start of the desk scene to the end? A. From a red lamp to a white door B. From a notebook and pen to a credit card and papers C. From a wooden sign to a stone pillar D. From a blue book to a green tree
What action does the man in the black suit perform later?
canonical_answer: He performs a high kick on the sidewalk.

question: What step came IMMEDIATELY before the person pulled the credit card from the package? A. Touching the base of the red desk lamp B. Pointing at the open notebook while holding a blue box C. Writing in the spiral-bound notebook with a silver pen D. Eating a wrapped food item outdoors
